title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 82.430 - Business to be regulated, rental fixed
text:
82.430.  Business to be regulated, rental fixed. — Such mayor and municipal assembly shall, by ordinance, regulate the business to be conducted and carried on in such market, and fix a yearly rental to be charged for stands or stalls in the market.
(RSMo 1939 § 7721, A.L. 1969 p. 145) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7573; 1919 § 8983; 1909 § 9834
